chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 473 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 20-10-2025 Mr. Mansoor Ali Panhwar, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioners are seeking their appointment on the basis of disabled quota in District Khairpur. Perusal of the petition reflects that all the Petitioners are belonging to district Khairpur, whereas, Chairman of the District Recruitment Committee / Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur has not been made party instead only Deputy Commissioner, Naushahro Feroze has been made as party, who has no concern with this petition. On further perusal of the petition, it transpires that some of the petitioners do not possess disability certificates issued by the Medical Board constituted under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Furthermore, it appears that each Petitioner has a distinct cause of action, yet they have jointly sought relief through a single petition. In view of the above, the present Petition is disposed of with directions to the petitioners who have been issued disability certificates issued by the Medical Board constituted under the aforesaid Act may file separate petition(s) afresh, in accordance with their respective cause of action. However, the petitioners who do not currently possess disability certificates issued by the Medical Board are directed to approach the relevant authorities for issuance of the same and upon obtaining such certificates from the Medical Board constituted under the Act, they may approach the concerned forums for redressal of their grievances.

In view of the above, the present Petition is disposed of with directions to the petitioners who have been issued disability certificates issued by the Medical Board constituted under the aforesaid Act may file separate petition(s) afresh, in accordance with their respective cause of action. However, the petitioners who do not currently possess disability certificates issued by the Medical Board are directed to approach the relevant authorities for issuance of the same and upon obtaining such certificates from the Medical Board constituted under the Act, they may approach the concerned forums for redressal of their grievances. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
